description_long: This object is a plush, blue stuffed toy with a rounded central body and multiple rounded protrusions radiating outward, resembling an abstract sea creature or cartoonish octopus. The main body is a soft, pillowy dome, while the protrusions are evenly spaced and have a slightly flattened appearance. The underside of the toy is lined with a contrasting light green fabric, visible along the edges of the protrusions. The surface texture appears to be made of a fuzzy, velvety material, giving it a soft and inviting look. There are no visible facial features or accessories, and the toy's construction suggests it is lightweight and squeezable. The overall design is playful and suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban parks or play areas.
description: A blue, plush stuffed toy with a rounded body and multiple soft, rounded protrusions, featuring a light green underside. The surface is fuzzy and velvety, with no visible facial features or accessories.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the circular blue body and all the rounded protrusions radiating outward, with the light green underside barely visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the dome-shaped body and the layered look of the blue and green fabrics along the protrusions.
description_view_2: Bottom view revealing the light green underside and the hollow, cave-like space beneath the central body, with the protrusions forming a ring.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view similar to view 1, showing the blue dome and the green-edged protrusions, with the underside partially visible.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features are visible on the toy; it has a featureless, smooth surface.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy's body is rounded with multiple protrusions extending outward, giving it a spread-out, relaxed posture.
